title: Ways to Make a Fair Array
titleCn: 生成平衡数组的方案数

testcases.input: nums = [2,1,6,4] Output: 1 Explanation: Remove index 0: [1,6,4] -> Even sum: 1 + 4 = 5. Odd sum: 6. Not fair. Remove index 1: [2,6,4] -> Even sum: 2 + 4 = 6. Odd sum: 6. Fair. Remove index 2: [2,1,4] -> Even sum: 2 + 4 = 6. Odd sum: 1. Not fair. Remove index 3: [2,1,6] -> Even sum: 2 + 6 = 8. Odd sum: 1. Not fair. There is 1 index that you can remove to make nums fair.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Remove index 0: [1,6,4] -> Even sum: 1 + 4 = 5. Odd sum: 6. Not fair. Remove index 1: [2,6,4] -> Even sum: 2 + 4 = 6. Odd sum: 6. Fair. Remove index 2: [2,1,4] -> Even sum: 2 + 4 = 6. Odd sum: 1. Not fair. Remove index 3: [2,1,6] -> Even sum: 2 + 6 = 8. Odd sum: 1. Not fair. There is 1 index that you can remove to make nums fair.

testcases.input: nums = [1,1,1] Output: 3 Explanation: You can remove any index and the remaining array is fair.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: You can remove any index and the remaining array is fair.

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3] Output: 0 Explanation: You cannot make a fair array after removing any index.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: You cannot make a fair array after removing any index.
